theme.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (4) + Organic & Earthy (1) - Editorial High-Tech
theme.vibe: Ultra-minimal monochrome with an editorial reading-paper feel, fused with high-tech precision. No gradients. No soft shadows. Hard 1px borders, generous whitespace, stark contrast.

app_chrome.usage: Headers, buttons, sidebars, settings sliders, utility text. Used for all UI elements outside the reading canvas.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for structural padding. Inside the reader canvas, maintain comfortable margins.

patterns.landing: Full height split or asymmetrical bento grid. Left side: Hero statement. Right side: Input zones (Text, PDF, Image, URL) arranged cleanly.
patterns.reader_view: Two-column layout on desktop: Left/Right floating narrow sidebar (16rem width) for controls, center reading canvas max-w-[65ch] or custom width. Mobile: controls inside a collapsible bottom drawer.
patterns.surfaces: No drop shadows. Use 1px solid borders for separation. Flat, crisp, print-like aesthetic.

buttons.style: Rectangular, sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm max). 1px border. Monochrome by default. Hover states invert colors or use subtle tint.
buttons.primary: bg-text_primary text-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200

inputs.style: Flat, sharp borders. focus:ring-1 focus:ring-text_primary. No rounded corners.
inputs.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-border p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center hover:bg-surface_secondary hover:border-text_secondary transition-all cursor-pointer

bionic_reader_canvas.style: The holy grail. Max width constraint based on user setting (e.g., max-w-[65ch]). Left-aligned text. Generous line height (leading-loose).
bionic_reader_canvas.bionic_logic: Wrap the first N letters of each word in a <b> tag. The <b> tag should use the 'bionic_bold' color, and the remainder of the word should use 'bionic_dim' color for maximum contrast. Fixation strength controls how many letters are bolded.

control_panel.style: Fixed sidebar or floating panel with 1px border. Contains sliders for fixation, selects for font, toggles for theme.
control_panel.sliders: Minimalist track (1px line), sharp square thumb.

interactions.hover: Instant visual feedback, no bouncy animations. Crisp, engineered feel.
interactions.transitions: opacity 150ms ease, color 150ms ease. Avoid transform animations unless necessary for layout shifts.
interactions.loading: Use an ASCII-style or simple typographic loader (e.g., 'PROCESSING...' flashing) instead of a generic spinner to fit the high-tech editorial vibe.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure the bionic bold vs dim colors maintain a readable contrast ratio against the background.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements MUST have a visible focus ring (e.g., focus:ring-1 focus:ring-text_primary focus:outline-none).
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

image_urls.instructions: Use with very low opacity (e.g., opacity-20) in the light theme background to give a subtle organic reading-paper feel without cluttering the UI.
Can be used as a subtle, heavily darkened or lightened graphic element in the empty state bento grid to reinforce the typographic/editorial theme.

dependencies.fonts: Import Outfit, Spectral, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure `data-testid` is added to all buttons, tabs, sliders, and dropzones.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card components with their default heavy rounded borders and drop shadows. If using Shadcn, override them to be sharp (rounded-none) with 1px border and zero shadow.
Implement a robust client-side Bionic Text converter function that processes text blocks accurately while preserving paragraphs.
For PDF extraction, use a library like pdfjs-dist. For URL extraction, implement a simple fetch or proxy to scrape the text, or mock it elegantly if the API is restricted.
Maintain strict separation between the 'UI Chrome' (menus, sidebars) and the 'Reader Canvas'. The Reader Canvas should feel sacred, blank, and focused.
